description: Your security team needs to monitor SSH brute force campaigns against the company's infrastructure. Because attack volumes fluctuate naturally throughout the day, static alerts are too noisy. Log in to Splunk at http://localhost:8000 (username: admin, password: SplunkAdmin1!) and create a day-over-day behavioral baseline visualization of failed SSH authentication events from the security_logs index. The visualization must aggregate event counts into 1-hour intervals and overlay the data on a 1-day cycle. Save the search as a report named 'DoD_Failed_Auth_Overlay' and add it to a new dashboard named 'Authentication_Baselines'.
